summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of BIBI Cars CRM P3 implementation: DocuSign Integration (mock mode) and Team Lead Login Approval. Found 3 issues with high success rate of 91.2%.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when creating login approval requests
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks Team Lead login approval flow completely
critical_bugs.details: Service instantiation or dependency injection issue in LoginApprovalService

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 201 status code instead of expected 200
minor_bugs.impact: Test expectation mismatch, functionality works correctly
minor_bugs.details: Endpoint works correctly but returns wrong HTTP status code

passed_tests: All P1 modules working: Payments (4 packages), Contracts, Shipping, Ringostat calls, Tasks (1 active rule)
All P2 modules working: Analytics (daily/owner/funnel), Alerts (stats/logs/settings/telegram), Risk Control (user/manager/daily), Telegram Bot API verified
DocuSign Config: Correctly showing mock mode (configured: false, mode: mock)
DocuSign Create Envelope: Working in mock mode (creates mock_env_* IDs)
Login Approval Pending: GET endpoint working (returns empty array)
31 out of 34 backend API endpoints tested successfully
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix LoginApprovalService 500 error - likely dependency injection or service instantiation issue. Check AlertsService and TelegramBotService dependencies in login-approval module. Also fix DocuSign signing URL status code from 201 to 200.
